title: Miners Trapped 10 Days Swam Out of the Cave Themselves
script: 7 gold miners were trapped in a flooded Laos cave for 10 days. The entrance had caved in. The tunnels filled with water. An international rescue team that helped save the Thai soccer team in 2018 raced to Laos. 4 miners didn't wait. They pushed through 1,000 feet of pitch-black flooded tunnels on their own and walked out alive. 2 others are still missing. They swam to freedom through the dark.
